title: Bundle Surface Validation (bundle-surface-validation v1.0)
description: Machine-readable self-check of a final emitted Lenskit bundle surface, produced by the generator after the manifest, agent_reading_pack and post_emit_health are present. Asserts surface coherence (claim_evidence_map present XOR machine-readable absence reason, agent-pack consistency, post_emit_health persistence AND status, generator runtime provenance, link coherence). Independent of output_health and never a truth/forensic verdict: a pass means the emitted surface is internally coherent, not that any claim is true.

authority.description: Optional, additive self-declaration of this artifact's authority class. When present it MUST be the diagnostic_signal constant; it is not a truth verdict and does not gate anything.

risk_class.description: Optional, additive self-declaration of this artifact's risk class. When present it MUST be the diagnostic constant.

run_id.description: Unique id for this surface validation run (not the bundle run).

bundle_run_id.description: run_id of the validated bundle manifest, when available.

bundle_manifest_path.description: Path to the validated bundle manifest.

require_claim_evidence_map.description: Whether a coherent claim_evidence_map surface was required for this bundle (true for a single-repo dump whose source repo ships docs/doc-freshness-registry.yml).

status.description: fail = active surface defect (silent claim-map absence, present/announced-absent contradiction, stale pack placeholder, missing provenance fields, dangling links, or a failed post_emit_health). blocked = a declared, honest gap (claim map absent with a machine-readable reason while required). warn = usable but degraded. pass = the emitted surface is internally coherent.

does_not_mean.description: Disclaimers of what a surface pass deliberately does NOT establish. These are NOT claim verdicts; in particular a coherent surface is not forensic-readiness.
